(SEE MINUTE ORDER).

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN: 2:00PM: C/C FOR JURY TRIAL. PRESENT: PLTF COUNSEL J.BORNSTEIN AND DEFT COUNSEL E.LEAVENGOOD. PLTF STATES THAT HE HAS REC'D FROM DEFT COUNSEL KEY TO PREMISES WITH DECLARATION THAT PREMISES HAVE BEEN VACATED. PREMISES WERE INSPECTED DURING NOON RECESS. DEFT COUNSEL STATES THAT ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON PREMISES MAY BE DEEMED ABANDONED AND DISPOSED OF BY PLTF AS PLTF SEES FIT. JT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR; PLTF TO FILE AMD COMPLNT; PLTF DOES NOT EXPRESS OR IMPLY ANY WAIVER RE ANY MONETARY DAMAGES OR DAMAGE TO PREMISES.
